_comment: Roster-and-squaddie verbs for the Strategy.Leaders group: roster-wide queries through the campaign roster, plus per-leader reads and mutations that take the BaseUnitLeader as their first argument. Hire and Dismiss live in core.json.

verbs.name: AvailableUnits
verbs.summary: The number of units currently available for deployment across the roster.

verbs.name: HasAliveAvailableLeader
verbs.summary: Whether the roster holds at least one alive, available leader.

verbs.name: CountByStatus
verbs.summary: The number of leaders in the roster with the given status.

verbs.name: PerkCount
verbs.summary: The number of perks the leader has taken.

verbs.name: HitpointsPct
verbs.summary: The leader's hitpoints as a 0..1 fraction of maximum.

verbs.name: IsDeployable
verbs.summary: Whether the leader can currently be deployed on an operation.

verbs.name: IsUnavailable
verbs.summary: Whether the leader is unavailable (e.g. recovering for a strategic duration).

verbs.name: AddPerk
verbs.summary: Add a perk to the leader; the second argument spends promotion points when true.

verbs.name: AddSquaddie
verbs.summary: Add the squaddie with the given id to the leader's squad (false if rejected).

verbs.name: RemoveSquaddie
verbs.summary: Remove the squaddie with the given id from the leader's squad (false if absent).
